overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a high-fidelity game engine showing two characters navigating a wooden boat through a scenic Nordic coastal fjord. The journey progresses from open water through a narrow inlet featuring a massive water wheel structure, past ancient ruins, and back into open water with floating platforms.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal fjord with rocky cliffs

events.description: approaching the narrow inlet between rocky cliffs with water wheel becoming visible

agents.ego_description: paddling the boat steadily through open water toward the narrow passage ahead, with a companion seated in the bow

entered.detail: steep granite cliff face with sparse vegetation rising from the water
tall rocky cliff with scattered pine trees on the plateau top
distant snow-dusted mountain peak visible between the coastal cliffs
green coniferous trees growing along the cliff edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide coastal fjord with clear blue water and scattered clouds overhead. The boat moves steadily forward between distant rocky cliffs, approaching a narrowing inlet. Natural sunlight illuminates the scene, highlighting the texture of the granite cliffs and distant mountain peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow water channel with ancient water wheel structure

events.description: entering the narrow channel with the large water wheel structure dominating the view ahead
boat passes close to the massive water wheel on the right side, navigating the tight passage

agents.ego_description: navigating the boat through the narrow passage, steering close to the large wooden water wheel and dock structures

entered.detail: massive wooden water wheel structure built into the cliff with water flowing from its top
weathered wooden dock and scaffolding along the right cliff face
waterfall flowing from the water wheel mechanism into the channel below
ancient stone wall remnants built into the left cliff face

segments.scene_description: The boat enters a narrow enclosed channel where the cliffs loom close on both sides. A massive wooden water wheel dominates the right side of the passage, with water cascading from its mechanism. Ancient stone ruins and wooden docks line the cliffs as the boat navigates through the tight space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow channel passing ancient ruins and wooden docks

events.description: passing the water wheel and entering the wider section of the inlet with stone arch ruins visible ahead
emerging from the narrow channel back into open water with distant ruins visible

agents.ego_description: steering the boat past wooden dock ruins, navigating through the narrow inlet and exiting to open water

entered.detail: ancient stone archway built into the cliff wall at the channel exit
scattered wooden planks and debris floating on the water surface
tall ruined stone tower structure on the distant cliff face
large wooden floating platforms with rope bridges in the distance

segments.scene_description: The boat continues through the narrow passage past the water wheel, navigating by ancient stone ruins and weathered wooden docks. The channel gradually widens as the boat exits to open water, revealing distant ruined towers and floating wooden platforms scattered across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water with floating platforms and distant ruins

events.description: boat slows while approaching the floating wooden platforms and debris field

agents.ego_description: paddling through open water toward floating wooden platforms and the distant ruined tower

entered.detail: rope bridge spanning high above the water between distant cliff peaks

segments.scene_description: The boat emerges into expansive open water under a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The camera approaches floating wooden platforms and debris scattered across the water, with a prominent ruined stone tower visible on the distant cliff. A rope bridge spans high overhead between mountain peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit coastal fjord into a narrow industrial inlet before emerging back into an expansive open waterway. It begins with the boat gliding through clear blue water between distant granite cliffs and mountain peaks under a scattered cloud layer. As the boat enters a tightening channel, the environment shifts to an enclosed space where massive wooden water wheels and ancient stone ruins loom closely on either side. The scene then expands as the boat navigates past weathered docks and exits the passage, revealing a wider vista of floating wooden platforms and distant ruined towers. Finally, the camera moves into the open sea under a bright sky, passing floating debris while a high rope bridge spans the mountain peaks overhead.
